overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character riding a horse equipped with a lantern through wilderness terrain at night. The rider is accompanied by an NPC companion on foot as they traverse grassy plains and cross a shallow river under moonlight.

agents.ego_description: riding horse at a walking pace along the grassy trail, illuminated by the horse-mounted lantern

entered.detail: prominent rocky outcrop on the left side of the trail
dense forest of pine trees forming the background horizon
open grassland path illuminated by the lantern light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark wilderness trail at night. The camera follows a horse rider from behind as they move through open grassland. A large rock formation looms on the left while a pine forest stretches across the distant background, all dimly lit by moonlight and the horse's lantern.

events.description: a man appears walking alongside the horse on the left side

agents.ego_description: maintaining a steady pace alongside the walking companion, navigating around scattered rocks

notable_agents.action: walking steadily alongside the horse, matching its pace through the grassland

entered.detail: distant glimpse of water or riverbank ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: A companion NPC joins the rider, walking on the left side of the horse. They continue through the grassy wilderness together, passing scattered boulders as the large rock formation falls behind them. The terrain remains open with the pine forest still visible in the background.

events.description: horse enters shallow river water, creating splashes

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse through the shallow river water, following the companion

notable_agents.action: wading through the knee-deep water beside the horse

entered.detail: shallow flowing water covering the ground, reflecting the lantern light
stones and pebbles visible beneath the clear water surface

segments.scene_description: The horse and companion enter a shallow river, transitioning from grass to water. The lantern light reflects off the rippling surface as they wade through the rocky riverbed. The pine forest shifts to the left side as they move through the watercourse.

events.description: horse exits the river onto the grassy opposite bank

agents.ego_description: riding along the riverbank following the companion who leads the way on foot

notable_agents.action: leading the way along the grassy path beside the river

entered.detail: grassy shoreline alongside the river with taller vegetation
large boulder formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The horse exits the water onto the grassy riverbank, with the river now flowing alongside to the left. The companion continues walking ahead on the grass path. A rocky outcrop appears on the right as they follow the river's edge, with the pine forest still visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit wilderness as a rider and their companion transition from open grasslands into a shallow river and back onto a grassy bank. It begins by following a horse rider from behind through dark plains, passing a large rock formation with a distant pine forest dimly lit by a lantern. As a companion joins the rider on foot, the camera tracks them past scattered boulders while the initial rock formation recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as the pair enters a shallow river, where the lantern light reflects off the rippling water and the pine forest moves to the left of the frame. Finally, the horse exits the water onto a riverbank, following the water's edge past a rocky outcrop while the companion leads the way through the grass.
